other_observers: None.; Other people have reported the Black phoebe at this location on other web sites.
specific_location: Florence River Walk, near the adjacent wastewater treatment plant
description: Black head, back wings, breast, and tail. White belly and undertail coverts. Black eye with head crest visible at times. Black beak and black legs. Size = 6 inches.Behaviors: The phoebe was making frequent short darting flights to catch insects and then returning to the branches it has just left. It emitted high pitched squeaks at frequent intervals.Call: High pitched "squeaks" at frequent intervalsPlumage: Black head, back, wings, white belly
